(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction
As performed by: The Rolling Stones
Key:  E, Original E
INTRO:  b b b c# d d d c# c# b     E  (E6)  E7/D   E6/D   E/D  x2


CHORUS:
E                 A7                E                  A7
  I can't get no     satisfaction,     I can't get no      satisfaction.
         E         B7        E         A            3rd x: Girl reaction
'Cause I try and I try and I try and I try.
        E      (E6)  E7/D   E6/D   (E/D)    E      (E6)  E7/D      E6/D   (E/D)
I can't get no,           I can't           get no.           When I’m


VERSE 1:
E             /D        E                /D
Drivin' in my car and a man comes on the radio
         E                   /D               E            /D
And he's tellin' me more and more  about some useless information
            E             /D
Supposed to drive my imagination.


PRE-CHORUS:
        E        /D          (E)  (drums)   (/D)  E      /D                E     /D
I can't get no,      oh no no no.         Hey hey hey,       that's what I say.

(CHORUS)


VERSE 2:
E           /D        E                /D
Watchin' my TV  and a man comes on and tells me
    E                   /D         E                        /D
How white my shirts can be. But he can't be a man 'cause he doesn't smoke
    E                  /D
The same cigarettes as me.

(PRE-CHORUS)  (CHORUS)

VERSE 3:
E                /D              E                  /D
Ridin' round the world   and I'm doin' this and I'm signing that
        E                   /D                  E                     /D
And I'm tryin' to make some girl  who tells me “baby better come back maybe next week”
           E             /D
'Cause you see, I'm on a losing streak.   (PRE-CHORUS)

END:
|   E             /D | x3       |         E        /D | x3              E
| I can't get no,    | x3       | no satisfaction,    | x3      no satisfaction
